query:
CREATE TYPE IF NOT EXISTS payment_status AS ENUM('pending', 'quote_received', 'reserved', 'committed', 'completed', 'failed', 'rejected');
CREATE TYPE IF NOT EXISTS payment_transaction_type AS ENUM('transfer', 'deposit', 'withdrawal', 'property_purchase', 'registration_fee', 'survey_fee');

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mojaloop_transactions (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  transaction_id VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  transfer_id VARCHAR(128) UNIQUE,
  quote_id VARCHAR(128) UNIQUE,
  user_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  property_id VARCHAR(64),
  escrow_contract_address VARCHAR(128),
  amount REAL NOT NULL,
  currency VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
  payer_fsp_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  payer_party_id_type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  payer_party_identifier VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  payer_name VARCHAR(255),
  payee_fsp_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  payee_party_id_type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  payee_party_identifier VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  payee_name VARCHAR(255),
  status payment_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  error_code VARCHAR(64),
  error_description TEXT,
  quote_amount REAL,
  quote_fees REAL,
  quote_expiration TIMESTAMP,
  transfer_state VARCHAR(32),
  transfer_fulfilment TEXT,
  transfer_condition TEXT,
  note TEXT,
  transaction_type payment_transaction_type NOT NULL DEFAULT 'transfer',
  purpose VARCHAR(255),
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  completed_at TIMESTAMP,
  reconciled_at TIMESTAMP,
  blockchain_tx_hash VARCHAR(128)
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS mojaloop_transactions_user_idx ON mojaloop_transactions(user_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS mojaloop_transactions_status_idx ON mojaloop_transactions(status);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS mojaloop_transactions_transaction_id_idx ON mojaloop_transactions(transaction_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS mojaloop_transactions_property_idx ON mojaloop_transactions(property_id);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mojaloop_payment_events (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  transaction_id VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  event_type VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  event_status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  request_payload TEXT,
  response_payload TEXT,
  error_code VARCHAR(64),
  error_message TEXT,
  fsp_id VARCHAR(64),
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS mojaloop_payment_events_transaction_id_idx ON mojaloop_payment_events(transaction_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS mojaloop_payment_events_event_type_idx ON mojaloop_payment_events(event_type);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mojaloop_fsp_config (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  fsp_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  fsp_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  api_base_url VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  api_version VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.1',
  auth_type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'BEARER',
  auth_token TEXT,
  certificate_path VARCHAR(512),
  supported_currencies TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
  supported_transaction_types TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'TRANSFER',
  is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  is_default BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS mojaloop_fsp_config_fsp_id_idx ON mojaloop_fsp_config(fsp_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS mojaloop_fsp_config_is_active_idx ON mojaloop_fsp_config(is_active);
